summary: Multilink module (Linktree-style) fully tested. Backend: 21/21 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: Admin dashboard and public pages working correctly. Fixed 1 bug: route ordering for /links/reorder endpoint.
seed_data_creation: Test page 'Alpha Agency' with slug 'alpha' exists with 2 links (Instagram, Site Web)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multilink module is fully functional. All CRUD operations for pages and links work. Public pages accessible at /lien-bio/{slug}. Stats tracking (views/clicks) working. Drag-and-drop reordering works after route fix.

Backend APIs.GET /api/multilink/pages: PASS - Lists pages with stats (views, clicks, link count)
Backend APIs.POST /api/multilink/pages: PASS - Creates page with auto-generated slug if empty
Backend APIs.DELETE /api/multilink/pages/{id}: PASS - Deletes page and associated links/stats
Backend APIs.PUT /api/multilink/pages/{id}/links/reor: PASS - Reorders links (FIXED route ordering bug)
Backend APIs.GET /api/multilink/pages/{id}/stats: PASS - Returns detailed stats (views/clicks by day, CTR)
Backend APIs.GET /api/multilink/public/{slug}: PASS - Public access without auth, records view
Backend APIs.GET /api/multilink/themes: PASS - Returns theme presets and social icons

Frontend Admin.Page selection: PASS - Displays page details with links
Frontend Admin.Create page dialog: PASS - General and Theme tabs, all fields work
Frontend Admin.Link management: PASS - Add, edit, delete, toggle active

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route was defined AFTER /pages/{page_id}/links/{link_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'reorder' as a link_id
bug_fixed.fix: Moved reorder route BEFORE routes with {link_id} parameter in /app/backend/routes/multilink.py
bug_fixed.verification: All 21 backend tests pass including reorder test
